parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_triajes, COUNT(CASE WHEN nivel_urgencia = 'critico' THEN 1 END) as criticos, COUNT(CASE WHEN nivel_urgencia = 'alto' THEN 1 END) as altos, COUNT(CASE WHEN nivel_urgencia = 'moderado' THEN 1 END) as moderados, COUNT(CASE WHEN nivel_urgencia = 'bajo' THEN 1 END) as bajos FROM triajes WHERE DATE(fecha_hora) = CURRENT_DATE

SELECT u.nombre_completo as profesional, COUNT(*) as cantidad_triajes FROM triajes t JOIN usuarios u ON t.id_usuario = u.id_usuario WHERE DATE(t.fecha_hora) = CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY u.nombre_completo ORDER BY cantidad_triajes DESC
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', fecha_hora) as hora, COUNT(*) as cantidad FROM triajes WHERE DATE(fecha_hora) = CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', fecha_hora) ORDER BY hora
